verdicts.note: His platform supports public investment and expanded services, but the dossier does not document a maximal expansion-of-government program.
Opposition to increased taxes supports a tax-restraint direction, but not the maximal tax-cut pole.
His emphasis on waste and cost restraint supports spending discipline, but no maximal-cut mechanism is documented.
Long business and community experience support a renewal lean, but make the maximal outsider score too strong.
Early-learning, health, and family-support priorities do not by themselves establish a position on the size of government spending.
Head Start policy-council leadership supplies institutional experience while the dossier shows no legislative tenure, making the record genuinely mixed.

review_notes: All 11 original candidate-axis pairs were reviewed exactly once (5 upheld, 5 adjusted, 1 refuted). No omitted axis had sufficiently specific evidence for a supported missing proposal.
